cognigrex_spine.label: Cognigrex
cognigrex_spine.definition: A group of biological or artificial observers who retain their individuality and work in perfect unison akin to a hive mind.
cognigrex_spine.operator_role: Achilles master builder and approval-gated orchestrator
guardrails: all destructive or external actions remain manual-approval only
single operator surface owns intake, routing, and approval context
smart floors populate only from proofed or staged datasets

lanes.label: Single Interface Shell
lanes.goal: One intake, review, routing, and settings surface rather than duplicated floor tabs.

lanes.label: Local LLM and Temp Shell Lane
lanes.surface: Neo workbench and Trinity editor over local Ollama
lanes.goal: Use local models for bounded drafting, code assistance, and handoff staging before any remote escalation.

lanes.label: Knowledge and Reservoir Lane
lanes.goal: Attach proofed doctrine, empirical sets, calculators, and references into one searchable source plane.

lanes.label: Review and Corroboration Lane
lanes.goal: Collapse extracted evidence, deltas, and overlap clusters into one review lab before promotion.

lanes.label: Simulation and Digital Twin Lane
lanes.surface: TheConstruct runtime profile and scenario lab
lanes.goal: Populate an empty but bounded digital-twin environment with proofed datasets and scenario runs.

lanes.label: Queue and Execution Lane
lanes.surface: Smith queue router and workflow state
lanes.goal: Hold only bounded, low-risk build tasks until manually approved for deeper automation.

lanes.label: Governance and Publish Lane
lanes.surface: Architect publish gate and approval wall
lanes.goal: Route repo, Drive, GO, and web artefacts through one manual approval gate.

lanes.label: Device and GO Bridge Lane
lanes.surface: Neo GO queue bridge with Achilles oversight contract
lanes.goal: Stage mobile or sidecar device actions only after D-root proof and manual approval.

lanes.label: Web and Repo Publish Lane
lanes.surface: Repo push, web, and external handoff artefacts
lanes.goal: Publish from proofed runtime state only after human review.
